MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Continued To Jul-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JENNIE LU'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to July 30, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the Moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 9, 2015, at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
